task_completion.description: Set Screaming Frog SEO Spider to 'List Mode'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is open and the 'Mode' in the top menu bar is set to 'List' (instead of 'Spider').
Screaming Frog GUI shows the URLs from the sitemap populated in the main window with crawl progress at 100%.

task_completion.description: Export the crawl data to sitemap_audit_data.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog in Screaming Frog exporting to '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/sitemap_audit_data.csv', or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists.
A text editor or terminal window showing the creation or existence of '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/sitemap_remediation.txt'.

task_completion.description: Report includes total URLs crawled and counts for 200, 3xx, 4xx, and 5xx status codes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the text report explicitly list the total number of URLs and the specific counts for 200 OK, 3xx Redirects, 4xx Errors, and 5xx Server Errors.

task_completion.description: Report lists the specific URLs that returned a 404 Not Found error
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the text report explicitly list the exact URL strings that returned a 404 status code during the crawl.

integrity.description: Agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog SEO Spider application open and actively used, rather than the agent using curl, python scripts, or terminal commands to fetch URL statuses.

integrity.description: Report reflects actual crawl results, not hallucinated expectations
integrity.visual_evidence: The status code counts and 404 URLs in the text report must match the actual results displayed in the Screaming Frog GUI. Because the sitemap contains malformed URLs, many/all may return 404s. The agent must report the ACTUAL results found, not what the URL strings imply (e.g., a URL ending in '200' might actually return a 404).

integrity.description: Agent used Screaming Frog's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking 'Export' in Screaming Frog to generate the CSV, rather than manually typing out a CSV file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The sitemap is located at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/sitemaps/draft_sitemap.xml and contains 5 URLs. CRITICAL: The URLs in the generated sitemap use an incorrect format for crawler-test.com (e.g., /status_codes/200 instead of /status_codes/status_200). Because of this, the actual status codes returned during the crawl will likely differ from what the URL path implies (e.g., they may all return 404 Not Found). The agent's report MUST reflect the ACTUAL status codes found by Screaming Frog during the crawl, not the intended status codes based on the URL strings. The export CSV must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/sitemap_audit_data.csv and the report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/sitemap_remediation.txt.
